components.name: AppShell
components.purpose: Top-level three-pane layout; composes project strip, workspace sidebar, main view, activity spine.

components.name: ProjectStrip
components.purpose: Slack-style vertical icon nav across projects. Includes + (new project) and ⌘ (quick switcher) affordances.

components.name: WorkspaceSidebar
components.purpose: Project header + Home button (project-level surface) + Workspaces list with 7-variant status icons (idle, in_progress, in_review, pr_open, pr_conflict, pr_ready, pr_merged) + inline '+' add button. Clicking a workspace auto-selects its first open tab.

components.name: MainView
components.purpose: Routes between project-home (when no workspace active) and workspace view (tabs + content). Hosts topbar (title · project · branch chip), Linear-style tabs bar with close-on-hover, single +New dropdown (⌘T), variant toggle on home only. Tab keyboard nav + ⌘W close + middle-click close.

components.name: TabLayout
components.purpose: Tab body primitive: scrollable content region + optional bottom dock slot for compose-style inputs. Matched max-width between scroll and dock so the dock feels aligned with content, not anchored to window edges.

components.name: ActivitySpine
components.purpose: Right-rail hierarchical status column. Flat-rendered tree with per-depth repeating-linear-gradient indent rails. Summary renders as dot+count per non-zero state (hides zeros; 'All quiet' fallback). Rows are text-only — no background, no border.

components.name: QuickSwitcher
components.purpose: Cmd+K fuzzy search across projects and workspaces. Dialog with focus trap.

components.name: HomeTabA
components.purpose: Project home — Variant A (quieter dashboard). Single-column stack: 'Project home' kicker + vision lede + titled sections (Near-term focus, Active workspaces with status icons, Recent reports, Needs-you, Autonomy). Panels, not cards; hairline dividers between groups.

components.name: HomeTabB
components.purpose: Project home — Variant B (palette-first, Dia-inspired). Centered prompt input + 4–6 context-aware suggestions (alerts, continue on active, draft plan, recent report, switch workspace). Collapsible brief drills into vision / focus / attention / autonomy.

components.name: PlanTab
components.purpose: Plan template: streaming chat with the team lead. Bottom-docked compose with file drag-drop (chip list of attachments), attach + disabled-mic (Phase 13 dictation stub) inline actions, model + effort selectors and plan-mode toggle in a footer row, arrow-icon send. ⌘↵ sends.

components.name: DesignTab
components.purpose: Design template: prototype browser + component catalog.

components.name: BuildTab
components.purpose: Build template: task list + merge-approval gate (non-bypassable, enforced in Rust core).

components.name: BlankTab
components.purpose: Blank template: empty canvas with prompt suggestions.

components.name: StreamingText
components.purpose: Claude-style character-by-character text reveal with blink cursor. Reduced-motion falls back to instant.

components.name: Onboarding
components.purpose: Three-slide first-run introduction. Dismissible; persists in localStorage.

components.name: ComponentCatalog
components.purpose: Live tile grid showing each Mini-inspired component and its token binding, for the Design tab.

components.name: PrototypePreview
components.purpose: Sandboxed iframe rendering agent-produced prototype HTML under strict meta-CSP.

components.name: AnnotationLayer
components.purpose: Pin-drop overlay on top of the prototype iframe; agentation-style batch comments.

components.name: VariantExplorer
components.purpose: Variant selector for the prototype preview.
